Content Warning:
Bot is supposed to do things with your consent`, but there's always a chance they could do things I didn't code them for, like mentions of g'rape, abuse, trauma and more. Don't take anything they say personally they're not real.

REMINDER!

Any errors like misgendering, gibberish, off topic, speaks for you, and more is NOT because of me but because of the llm. Any complaints about it will be ignored :( I also take constructive and reasonable criticism and feedback, nothing rude or disrespectful or just vague ♡♡
